title: Control accounts
summary: 9706 — sales, purchases, and trade receivables/payables control accounts.
learningObjectives: Prepare sales and purchases ledger control accounts.
Reconcile control accounts with ledger totals.
Identify errors using control account differences.

simpleExplanation.title: Checking the sub-ledgers
simpleExplanation.summary: Control accounts summarise receivables and payables — if they don't match sub-ledger totals, an error exists somewhere in the system.
steps: Sales ledger control — total owed by customers.
Purchases ledger control — total owed to suppliers.
Entries from books of prime entry.
Reconciliation — control = sum of individual accounts.

sections.content: **Control accounts** (1.4.4) completes 1.4. Learn **standard layout** for SLCA and PLCA.
